revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 2일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初二]][[zh:七月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 2|qq=July 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 2''' is the 2nd day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Tempyo-Kampō|ja|Tenpyō感宝|1=Tenpyō-kanpō|2=ja|3=天平感宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo-Kampō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373199}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}} , {{ill|749|en|749|qid=Q23624|lt=749|1=749}} ) – Crown Prince {{ill|Abe naishinnō|ja|阿倍内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe naishinnō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Empress Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232955}} ascended the throne as the 46th monarch, {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|qid=Q232955|lt=Empress Kōken|1=Empress Kōken}} . The era name changed from {{ill|Tempyo|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} to {{ill|Tempyo-Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo-Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373169}} to mark her enthronement. * Year 17 of {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|798|en|798|qid=Q33460|lt=798|1=798}} ) – {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|qid=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} established {{ill|Kiyomizu-dera|en|Kiyomizu-dera|qid=Q221716|lt=Kiyomizu-dera|1=Kiyomizu-dera}} in {{ill|Heian-kyō|en|Heian-kyō|qid=Q751907|lt=Heian-kyō|1=Heian-kyō}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – The {{ill|Bombardment of Kagoshima|en|Bombardment of Kagoshima|qid=Q1352401|lt=Anglo-Satsuma War|1=Bombardment of Kagoshima}} began as the British fleet bombarded Kagoshima.
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}} , {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}} ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa Orihito|ja|有栖川宮織仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa Orihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Orihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516505}} , 6th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|en|Arisugawa-no-miya|qid=Q2861427|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya|1=Arisugawa-no-miya}} (d. {{ill|1820|en|1820|qid=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} ). * Year 8 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1758|en|1758|qid=Q7639|lt=1758|1=1758}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Momozono|en|Emperor Go-Momozono|qid=Q314063|lt=Emperor Go-Momozono|1=Emperor Go-Momozono}} , 118th emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1779|en|1779|qid=Q7714|lt=1779|1=1779}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}} , {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} , 74th emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|1103|en|1103|qid=Q12487|lt=1103|1=1103}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} /Year 3 of {{ill|Engen (Southern Court)|ja|Engen|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|1=Engen|2=ja|3=延元|qid=Q1194159|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engen (Southern Court)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194159}} (Intercalary 7th month, Julian calendar {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|ja|Nitta Yoshisada|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nitta Yoshisada|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , samurai (b. {{ill|1301|en|1301|qid=Q5610|lt=1301|1=1301}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō (Edo period)|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1652|en|1652|qid=Q6962|lt=1652|1=1652}} ) – {{ill|Miura Tameharu|ja|三浦為春|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miura Tameharu|1=Miura Tameharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11356500}} , retainer of the {{ill|Kishū Tokugawa family|en|Kishū Tokugawa family|qid=Q11605046|lt=Kishū Tokugawa clan|1=Kishū Tokugawa family}} (b. {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} ) – {{ill|Kada no Azumamaro|en|Kada no Azumamaro|qid=Q1334955|lt=Kada no Azumamaro|1=Kada no Azumamaro}} , scholar of {{ill|Kokugaku|en|Kokugaku|qid=Q855159|lt=Kokugaku|1=Kokugaku}} and one of the Four Great Kokugaku Scholars (b. {{ill|1669|en|1669|qid=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1757|en|1757|qid=Q7635|lt=1757|1=1757}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munenobu|ja|徳川宗直|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Munenobu|1=Tokugawa Munenao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6993442}} , 6th {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=Daimyō|1=Daimyo}} of {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} (b. {{ill|1682|en|1682|qid=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}} ).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Battle of Maruyama Castle|ja|丸山城の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Maruyama Castle|1=Siege of Maruyama Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11368190}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|1|7|3|6|2|8|7|0702|qq=}}

[[ar:July 2 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初二]] {{wikidata link|Q839784}} [[Category:Days 2 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
